description:
☙ 𝐕𝐀𝐌𝐏𝐈𝐑𝐄 𝐓𝐑𝐀𝐂𝐊𝐈𝐍𝐆. 🧛

« Is it because you already know that you are mine as much as I am yours ? »

You've been hunting him for months, under orders from the Vampire Hunters organization. But this quickly turned into a playful cat and mouse chase, and now, you both hesitate to put and end to the game.

nda 🎀 : He piss me off, I will try to make it better when I can. Also, I didn't wrote anywhere that user is human so you can actually be whatever you want (being a vampire too wouldn't make sense tho). But imagine being able to regenerate when he takes a bite out of you ? So romantic and cute and hot, right ? ☹️
